title: lepidium latifolium var. affine
intro: Lepidium latifolium var. affine, also known as cress or garden cress, is a plant in the mustard family with broad leaves and white flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lepidium latifolium var. affine include its ability to stimulate digestion, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Lepidium latifolium var. affine can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or added to salads and other dishes to harness its medicinal properties.
